focus: Applied Orionfold DS v6.2 to the Arena cockpit (the public-site DS had scoped Arena out; operator chose the full system incl. dark). 5 arena-app source files (+308/-86): brand accent blue-indigo -> CYAN single-accent (#0e9e98 light / #14c8c0 dark) across all 3 token locations + gold retired as an action color; a full LIGHT/DARK theme (html.arena-app[data-theme=dark] token remap, 35 shadow + 4 sheen literals routed through new --arena-shadow-rgb/--arena-sheen so they flip in one place; sun/moon top-bar toggle + no-FOUC init; DARK IS DEFAULT, saved light overrides); the nav monogram -> Orionfold disc+star mark; the DS .of-table primitive onto the generic cloud-price table (the bespoke .ranktable leaderboard left as-is per the DS migration map); premium-narrative gold cooled to cyan + dark tuning. t1-t7 = N/A for the cockpit (its badges are status-semantic, not identity tags). arena-app astro build clean (141 pages); CDP both-theme smoke + sharp pixel-sampling found ZERO magenta cast; dark-by-default confirmed for a fresh visitor. Verified via the arena-app dev server (/tmp/fk venv gone post-reboot); the _webui rebake is the next fieldkit release's job (recorded in fieldkit [Unreleased]).
